upstream_status.summary: 37 upstream commits since prior pin; 0 touch plugins/commit-commands/. Changes were CHANGELOG churn, GitHub Actions SHA pinning (#56784), SECURITY.md HackerOne link refresh (#53949), and a yaml.github-actions security fix (#43824). Pin refreshed to baseline future checks.

customizations.summary: Added marketplace release command with guard
customizations.reason: Marketplace-specific release flow: detect changed plugins, bump versions, update marketplace.json, commit, tag, push. Guarded to only run in repos with .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.
